offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 vendors/month, lack of visibility into vendor certifications causes compliance issues. We provide a vendor management platform instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking vendor certifications and performance leads to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where insurance brokers seek advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to insurance brokers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance broker tools
try_it: Let users try Certification tracking and Performance monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video illustrating the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
